Strings.⚠ ToyBox: \"Ctrl + Mouse3 Drag To Adjus: ⚠  ToyBox: "Ctrl + Mouse3 Drag To Adjust Camera Elevation" is ON – it makes the camera load at a map origin and pan from there. Turn it off in ToyBox → Camera. (The Mouse3-aim option is fine to keep; pitch needs it.)
Strings.– the toggle key steps through the ticke: – the toggle key steps through the ticked targets in order; Vanilla is the game's own camera.
Strings.Invert gamepad pitch – flip the right-s: Invert gamepad pitch  – flip the right-stick up/down look direction (View 1 on a pad)
Strings.– 1.0× leaves the game's own turn untouc: – 1.0× leaves the game's own turn untouched; other values replace it with a proportional turn
Strings.– hold the right-stick click (R3) and pu: – hold the right-stick click (R3) and push the stick up/down to zoom (View 1 on a pad)
Strings.Direct character control on gamepad load: Direct character control on gamepad load  – the left stick moves your character (click the stick to toggle)
Strings.Apply View 1 on game load (area-to-area: Apply View 1 on game load (area-to-area transitions keep the current camera)
Strings.Focus offset (enables each view's pivot: Focus offset  (enables each view's pivot + shoulder + dolly)
Strings.Ctrl+scroll live-tunes the active view's: Ctrl+scroll live-tunes the active view's pivot height; Ctrl+Shift+scroll its dolly. Pivot is world-up, so it holds through turns and never jumps when mouselook toggles.
Strings.dialogue framing – Off hands off to the: dialogue framing – Off hands off to the game; Lift only keeps a gentle raise with no zoom; Full tactical holds an over-the-shoulder framing while the game still frames the speakers left/right. Set the Full-tactical height (and an optional fixed zoom) per view in each view's block above.
Strings.Mouselook – tick a view's \"mouselook\": Mouselook  – tick a view's "mouselook" box in its block above to make it drive yaw/pitch with the mouse (cursor locked to centre)
Strings.hold that key for a normal pointer; dial: hold that key for a normal pointer; dialogue, menus, the global map and this panel free it automatically.
Strings.Hide off-screen character markers (edge: Hide off-screen character markers  (edge portrait pointers)
Strings.Scripted (hard-bound) camera shots are a: Scripted (hard-bound) camera shots are always left alone, regardless of these settings.
Strings.lock pitch – hold this tilt through cut: lock pitch  – hold this tilt through cutscenes and transitions (mouselook overrides it)
Strings.focus offset – needs \"Focus offset\" en: focus offset – needs "Focus offset" enabled below:
Strings.live follow – lock the model in frame a: live follow  – lock the model in frame at close range (best on the dollied-in view - but can add movement stutter)
Strings.solid walls – stop walls/doors dissolvi: solid walls  – stop walls/doors dissolving in front of the camera in this view
Strings.free-aim cursor (gamepad) – in cursor c: free-aim cursor (gamepad)  – in cursor control, the left stick moves the pointer in screen space instead of panning the camera
Strings.– fires once as combat begins or ends; a: – fires once as combat begins or ends; a chosen view that isn't saved is skipped. Space combat (Rogue Trader) is not covered.
Strings.In mouselook, hide the hover highlight o: In mouselook, hide the hover highlight on the character you control
